relations.note: Hero-specific three-line stacking order refines the base headline font/case/alignment rule.
Color and letter-tint treatment co-applies alongside the headline's font/case/alignment styling on the same element.
The verbatim lockup copy is the text rendered using the headline styling defined in campaign_headline_typography.

quotes: Set in **Agenda** (digital may use Agenda as live text for this headline only; email fallback: Nunito Sans ExtraBold).

rules.intent: Lock the campaign headline's typeface, casing, and alignment so the lockup renders consistently across digital and email.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline 'YOU DESERVE MORE' is set in Agenda (headline.font.print = Agenda); digital placements may render it as live text in Agenda, but email must fall back to Nunito Sans ExtraBold. The headline is always ALL CAPS (case.campaign_headline.all_caps) and left-aligned (alignment.campaign_headline.left).

quotes: Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.
Stack as three lines (YOU / DESERVE / MORE) in hero placements, left-aligned.

rules.intent: Preserve the approved three-line hero lockup for the campaign headline.
rules.rule_text: In hero placements, the campaign headline must stack as three separate lines in the fixed order YOU / DESERVE / MORE.

quotes: are set at approximately 40% tint of the headline color — a nod to the "d" and "m" of dermatomyositis.
(tinted letters at 40% of the same hue).

rules.intent: Encode a subtle disease-awareness cue (the 'd' and 'm' of dermatomyositis) into the headline while keeping color usage flexible between the two approved palettes.
rules.rule_text: The campaign headline uses one of two approved colorways — Gold/Sunshine (campaign_headline.color default = #ffc60a) or Brand Blue (#00529b) — and the initial letters 'D' (DESERVE) and 'M' (MORE) are tinted at approximately 40% opacity of the headline color (opacity.headline.letter_tint_40 = 0.4) as a visual nod to 'dermatomyositis'.

effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
Full lockup copy: "**YOU DESERVE MORE.** So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis."

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Protect the approved campaign tagline and product claim wording from unauthorized alteration.
rules.rule_text: The full campaign lockup — 'YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.' — must be reproduced verbatim wherever the full lockup copy is used.
